accurate.why: All provisions, deadlines (90 days, 270 days, 180 days, 5-year sunset), reporting requirements, and scope limitations accurately described.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all details traceable to the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose: requiring Facility Security Committees to respond to FPS security recommendations.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes new statutory requirements imposed on Facility Security Committees and DHS.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the scope limitation to GSA/non-GSA fee-paying facilities, the no-additional-funds clause, and the 5-year sunset.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states all deadlines: 90 days (FSC response), 270 days (first annual report), 180 days (surveillance tech report), 5-year sunset, and December 17, 2024 enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: All major provisions covered: FSC response requirement, DHS monitoring, annual reports, surveillance tech report, scope limitation, sunset, and GAO report.

concise.why: Very detailed for a summary; includes granular report content elements that add length beyond what a summary requires.

correct_entities.why: FPS, DHS Secretary, GSA, Comptroller General, and correct congressional committees all accurately named.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
